title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zostel Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zostel Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zostel Asia Pacific Associates family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zostel Asia Pacific Associates:
Zostel Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zostel Asia Pacific Associates!
